task.label: Notify the personal data breach to the supervisory authority

conditions.condition: in the case of a personal data breach
where feasible, not later than 72 hours after having become aware of it

exception.description: unless the personal data breach is unlikely to result in a risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons

task.label: Accompany notification with reasons for the delay

conditions.condition: if the notification to the supervisory authority is not made within 72 hours

task.label: Notify the controller of a personal data breach

conditions.condition: after becoming aware of a personal data breach

task.label: Describe the nature of the personal data breach including categories and approximate numbers of data subjects and records concerned
Communicate the name and contact details of the data protection officer or other contact point
Describe the likely consequences of the personal data breach
Describe the measures taken or proposed to address the personal data breach
Provide information in phases without undue further delay

conditions.condition: if it is not possible to provide the information at the same time

task.label: Communicate the personal data breach to the data subject

conditions.condition: when the personal data breach is likely to result in a high risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons

exception.description: if the controller has implemented appropriate technical and organisational protection measures applied to the affected personal data
if the controller has taken subsequent measures ensuring that the high risk to the rights and freedoms of data subjects is no longer likely to materialise
if the communication would involve disproportionate effort

task.label: Describe in clear and plain language the nature of the personal data breach
Include at least the information and measures referred to in points (b), (c) and (d)
Make a public communication to inform data subjects in an equally effective manner

conditions.condition: if the communication to the data subject would involve disproportionate effort

task.label: Require the controller to communicate the personal data breach to the data subject

conditions.condition: if the controller has not already communicated the personal data breach to the data subject
having considered the likelihood of the personal data breach resulting in a high risk

task.label: Communicate the personal data breach to the data subject

conditions.condition: if required by the supervisory authority
if the controller has not already communicated the personal data breach to the data subject

task.label: Decide that any of the conditions referred to in paragraph 3 are met

conditions.condition: if the controller has not already communicated the personal data breach to the data subject
having considered the likelihood of the personal data breach resulting in a high risk
